testCases.name: happy path - microservice completes and process ends
testCases.description: Starts the process, mocks the microservice job (type: orchestrate-something), and asserts the process completes.

_integrationTestNotes: Integration tests should verify: (1) Run_microservice (job type: orchestrate-something) is picked up and completed by the real job worker implementation; (2) the worker correctly connects to Zeebe and activates jobs of this type; (3) confirm the worker completes the job without errors and the process reaches IS_COMPLETED.
